## Description

Brief description of the changes. What does this PR do and why?

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring / code cleanup

## Testing

- [ ] I have run `go test ./...` and all tests pass
- [ ] I have run `go vet ./...` and there are no issues
- [ ] I have checked formatting with `gofmt -s -w .`
- [ ] I have tested the changes manually in a browser

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project style guidelines (see `.editorconfig`)
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation (if applicable)
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] I have updated `TASKS.md` if this PR completes a task
